name: Nodian

releases.author: AkiSantin
releases.description:
## 1.4.14

### Mobile
- New native-style card UI for managing relation pairs on phones (list + add screens, autocomplete inputs)
- Fixed mobile layout issues: settings rows overflowing, modal not scrolling, dropdown hidden behind the keyboard

### New
- Ribbon button for running a full sync (toggle in settings, on by default)

### Fixed
- Deleting a pair no longer removes other pairs sharing the same property names under different tags
- Pairs with the same properties but different tags can now be created
- Backlink writes right after creating a pair now follow the same tag checks as auto sync
- New-file backfill now checks the new file's existing tags
- Disabling the plugin no longer breaks other plugins that hook the property menu

### Changed
- UI text revised in all three languages (en / ja / zh-TW)
- README: ribbon + mobile docs, fixed stretched screenshots

releases.author: AkiSantin
releases.description: Fix Obsidian community plugin review issues.

releases.author: AkiSantin
releases.description:
## Nodian v1.4.4

This release publishes the plugin source code in the repository for easier review before installation.

### Changed

- Published TypeScript source files and build configuration.
- Added a standard MIT `LICENSE` file.
- Reduced console logging so frontmatter contents are no longer printed during normal YAML writes.
- Updated package metadata to `1.4.4`.

### Install

**BRAT**: Add Beta Plugin → `AkiSantin/Nodian`

**Manual**: Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release and copy them to:

`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/nodian/`
releases.name: Nodian v1.4.4

releases.author: AkiSantin
releases.description:
## Nodian v1.4.2

Automatically sync bidirectional relations in YAML frontmatter — like Notion's Relation, but for Obsidian.

### Features

- **Auto sync** — add or remove a wikilink in a frontmatter field, the backlink updates instantly
- **Tag-based matching** — each pair requires tags; sync only fires when both field name and tag match
- **Display names** — optionally use `title` field as display text in backlinks (off by default)
- **New file support** — creating a file from a wikilink auto-adds tags and backlinks
- **Full sync** — scan all files and backfill missing backlinks via Command Palette
- **Localized** — English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
- **Mobile support** — works on both desktop and mobile

### Install

**BRAT**: Add Beta Plugin → `AkiSantin/Nodian`

**Manual**: Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` to `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/nodian/`
